name.jp: マックス☆ハートキャッチ

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52201_1]</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52201_1]</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52201_1]</color>の確率で味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52201_1]</color>UPする。\nこのスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52201_1]</color> 확률로 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52201_1]</color> 회복합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52201_1]</color>的几率使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52201_1]</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52202_0]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52202_0]回合</color>。

name.jp: キラキラ☆トゥインクル

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52203_0]</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52203_0] turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52203_0]</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52203_0]ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52203_0]</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52203_0]턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52203_0]</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52203_0]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
